headline: Alphabet's Board of Directors approved 2026 equity awards for key executive officers, utilizing a mix of performance and restricted stock units.
investor_impact: The compensation structure aligns executive incentives with long-term shareholder value through TSR-linked PSUs and retention-focused GSUs, while finalizing the transition away from the SVP Bonus program. This is a standard corporate governance update with no immediate impact on financial modeling or the core investment thesis.
key_figures: Anat Ashkenazi (CFO): $10,000,000 PSUs, $20,000,000 GSUs, $6,000,000 transitional award
Ruth Porat (CIO): $9,000,000 PSUs, $20,000,000 GSUs, $5,000,000 transitional award
Philipp Schindler (CBO): $16,000,000 PSUs, $26,000,000 GSUs, $5,666,667 transitional award
Kent Walker (CLO): $9,000,000 PSUs, $20,000,000 GSUs, $5,000,000 transitional award
PSU payout range: 0%-200% of target based on 2026-2028 relative TSR vs S&P 100
GSU vesting schedule: Monthly over 3 years (2026-2028)
